title: Compact Path Chrome
summary: Added a Path-view cockpit chrome mode that exposes the active detail view on the body, compresses the Atlas masthead and deck dock, and caps the Path detail panel inside the first viewport.
verification: python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests\test_agent_company_atlas_compact_path_chrome.py -q failed before implementation because body detail-view state and compact chrome CSS were missing.
Browser verification confirmed the Path board starts at y=123 instead of the previous y=220, and the detail panel ends at y=708 inside a 720px viewport.
python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests -q -k agent_company_atlas (42 passed, 55 deselected)
python -c snapshot check confirmed compact task and trace are present with 12 lanes
